enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Bang Bang Bang'?

The song 'Bang Bang Bang' conveys a sense of excitement and energy, reflecting the lively spirit of the movie Anjaan.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

This song is a celebration of the protagonist's adventurous spirit and showcases the vibrant atmosphere of the film Anjaan.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Ranjith and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Bang Bang Bang' released?

'Bang Bang Bang' was released on July 23, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Bang Bang Bang', the protagonist's exuberance is captured through lively beats and catchy lyrics, making it a perfect dance number. The song reflects the high-energy vibe of the movie Anjaan, showcasing themes of celebration and adventure. With Ranjith's powerful vocals and Yuvan's vibrant composition, it evokes feelings of joy and excitement. This track is ideal for parties and celebrations, inviting listeners to join in the fun.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Bang Bang Bang from Anjaan is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the vibrant energy of the film. With Ranjith's powerful vocals and Yuvan's dynamic composition, this track is sure to get you moving. Dive into the pulsating beats and catchy lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Bang Bang Bang
lyrics from teaser
Bang bang bang Bang bang bang
No matter which garden you take, it’s still a big road to Mumbai gate.
Here, if there’s a fire, he will protect his name in danger.
If you call the Andheri tiger, it will hit your heart, bang bang bang.
If Raju bhai sees you, bang bang bang.
If Raju bhai comes in front of you, bang bang bang.
If Raju bhai sees you, bang bang bang.
If Raju bhai comes in front of you,
No matter which garden you take, it’s still a big road to Mumbai gate.
When love is tested, it’s a blow; when a disguise is put on, it’s a hit, that’s Raju bhai’s magic.
When anger comes, it’s time to strike; when the time comes, it’s Raju bhai’s power.
Hey, the show must change, don’t let his dance change; hey, the rule must change, don’t let this group change, come, come, come..
bang bang bang bang bang bang
For the whole world to love, we give respect to friends, that’s all.
Justice won’t win, don’t need laws; don’t need to follow the rules, that’s all.
You blow money here, don’t do it for work; your two eyes’ tears are enough, don’t say anything. Hey, come, come, come..
If Raju bhai sees you, bang bang bang.
If Raju bhai comes in front of you, bang bang bang.
